code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line1)

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(string.trim(part))
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let k_parsed = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  let total = nums.len()
  let actual_k = if k_parsed > total
    total
  else
    k_parsed
  end

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = nums
  mut j = 0
  while j < actual_k
    let max_val = match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, max_val)
    remaining = remove_first(remaining, max_val)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut k2 = 0
  while k2 < result.len()
    let val = match result.get(k2)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if k2 == 0
      output = "#{val}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{val}"
    end
    k2 = k2 + 1
  end
  println(output)
  Ok(())
end

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut found = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    let val = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if not found and val == target
      found = true
    else
      result = list.push(result, val)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end
